title: Romort Raort

'''Romort Raort''' was a sadistic criminal from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Irith]]. Raort eventually joined with the [[Elaginn gang]], a group of [[spice-jacker]]s, and was responsible for tracking down the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] from whom the group stole. He [[Death/Legends|murdered]] the leader of the Elaginn gang, [[Elaginn]] himself, and took control of the spice-jacking group. Under Raort's control the group flourished and made deals with the neighboring [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clans. Though Raort wished to take over the entire operation for himself, he was quite content making people suffer at his current job. Raort performed many of his spice-jacking runs by disabling targeted [[Starship/Legends|ships]] with a stolen [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] and selling their crews into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]]. By [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Raort and his group had settled down on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta's]] largest [[Moon/Legends|moon]].

==Biography==
Romort Raort grew up on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Irith]],<ref name="DESB" /> a polluted and overcrowded world located on the [[Ootmian Pabol/Legends|''Ootmian Pabol'']] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> As a youth, Raort bullied other children for their lunch [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]] and reveled in the suffering of others. Eventually, he fell in with the [[Elaginn gang]], a group of [[spice-jacker]]s headed by a [[Gender/Legends|man]] named [[Elaginn]]. As a spice-jacker, Raort's job was to track down [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and lay ambushes for them while their [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were [[Hangar/Legends|docked]].<ref name="DESB" />

In a bid to usurp power, Raort murdered Elaginn, [[Flexi-paste|flexi-pasting]] the gang leader to a chair and [[List of phrases and slang/Legends#D|defenestrating]] him. Raort wrote off Elaginn's [[Death/Legends|death]] as an accident and took control of the gang, claiming it to be Elaginn's wish. Raort was soon able to build the gang up enough to become one of the largest spice-jacking rings in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].<ref name="DESB" /> He made deals with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clans, which allowed him to operate along most of the major [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] spice routes,<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> though he still wished to branch out. He realized that he would have to wait [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before he had developed enough influence to challenge the Hutts.<ref name="DESB" />

Raort had contacts in the port authorities of dozens of worlds, making his job fairly easy. These resources enabled him to see where large shipments of spice were headed at any given time. Using an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] he had stolen from a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] gunrunners, he attacked ships still in dock and stripped them of their cargo while readying their crews for sale into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]].<ref name="DESB" /> By [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Raort and his group were based out of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], the largest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="SWE" /><ref name="DE3">[[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]]</ref> He was quite unpopular among the rest of the underworld community, since he had stolen from many of them. Still, nobody dared to cross Raort, because his group was notorious for exacting swift vengeance against its enemies.<ref name="SWE" />

==Personality and traits==
Romort Raort had only one pleasure in life: seeing other people suffer. He enjoyed his job as a spice-jacker because it allowed him to inflict cruelty on others. Through determination and foul play, Raort was able to take control of the Elaginn gang. Raort was also a very patient being, willing to wait years to take over the Hutt spice-jacking ring. He was adept at basic [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] operation and knew how to perform [[Torture/Legends|torture]]. He typically wore a [[Rebreather/Legends|breather]] [[Blast helmet/Legends|blast helmet]] with a set of [[blast armor]], an ammo [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]], and a modified [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]].<ref name="DESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Romort Raort first appeared as a background character in the [[Dark Empire 3|third issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series in [[1992]], written by [[Tom Veitch]] and illustrated by [[Cam Kennedy]]. He was later identified and given a full background in the [[1993]] ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', written by [[Michael Allen Horne]]. The character's backstory was also expanded upon in the [[1998]] ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
